scripts.desktop:build: corepack pnpm local-vision:clean-release-resources && corepack pnpm local-vision:prepare-runtime && corepack pnpm --filter @javis/desktop tauri build --bundles nsis && corepack pnpm local-vision:verify-release-resources
scripts.local-vision:prepare-runtime: corepack pnpm local-vision:prepare-node && corepack pnpm local-vision:prepare-onnxruntime
scripts.local-vision-worker:test: node scripts/test-local-vision-worker.mjs && node scripts/test-local-vision-onnx-adapter.mjs && node scripts/test-local-vision-doctor.mjs && node scripts/test-local-vision-smoke.mjs && node scripts/test-local-vision-benchmark.mjs && node scripts/test-local-vision-bundle-config.mjs && node scripts/test-prepare-local-vision-node-runtime.mjs && node scripts/test-prepare-local-vision-onnxruntime-runtime.mjs && node scripts/test-clean-local-vision-release-resources.mjs && node scripts/test-check-local-vision-release-resources.mjs
scripts.test: corepack pnpm -r --if-present test && corepack pnpm rust:test
scripts.check: corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm local-vision:prepare-runtime && corepack pnpm local-vision-worker:test && corepack pnpm --filter @javis/desktop build && corepack pnpm rust:check
scripts.qa:product-workflows: node scripts/test-check-product-workflow-evidence.mjs && node scripts/test-git-remote-pr-preflight.mjs && node scripts/test-release-rollback-notes.mjs && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/qa/check-product-workflow-evidence.ps1 -AllowKnownBlockers
scripts.qa:product-workflows:source: node scripts/test-check-product-workflow-evidence.mjs && node scripts/test-trend-hot-list-release-qa.mjs && node scripts/test-repo-intelligence-release-qa.mjs && node scripts/test-git-remote-pr-release-qa.mjs && node scripts/test-git-remote-pr-preflight.mjs && node scripts/test-browser-terminal-approval-release-qa.mjs && node scripts/test-agent-memory-embedding-provider-release-qa.mjs && node scripts/test-capability-scoring-evidence-ingestion-release-qa.mjs && node scripts/test-release-rollback-notes.mjs && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/qa/check-product-workflow-evidence.ps1 -AllowKnownBlockers
